name: Wheat
description: Cool-season cereal grain; moderate water needs with drought tolerance after establishment.

name: Rice
description: Semi-aquatic cereal requiring flooded or saturated soil conditions for most of the growing season.

name: Corn / Maize
description: Warm-season C4 grass with high water demand, especially during tasseling and grain fill.

name: Tomato
description: Warm-season fruit crop sensitive to both over- and under-watering; consistent moisture reduces cracking.

name: Potato
description: Cool-season tuber crop; uniform soil moisture is critical during tuber initiation and bulking.

name: Soybean
description: Warm-season legume; water demand peaks during flowering and pod fill stages.

name: Cotton
description: Warm-season fiber crop with deep roots; tolerates heat but needs reliable moisture during boll development.

name: Lettuce
description: Cool-season leafy green with shallow roots; requires frequent, light irrigation to prevent wilting.

name: Sugarcane
description: Tropical perennial grass with very high water use; long growing season requires sustained irrigation.

name: Barley
description: Hardy cool-season cereal; more drought-tolerant than wheat with lower overall water requirements.
